description_long: This is a small wooden cabin with a gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles, featuring a simple and rustic design. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks with a light, weathered finish. One side of the cabin has a single rectangular window with a white frame, while the opposite side features a centered door with a small vertical window above it, both framed in matching wood. A small porch with a wooden railing extends from the door side, providing a sheltered entryway. The roof has a moderate overhang, offering some protection to the porch and windows. The overall structure is compact and functional, suitable for residential or recreational use in an urban or park setting.
description: A compact wooden cabin with a gable roof, a small porch, and simple window and door arrangements. The exterior is finished in light wood with a reddish-brown shingled roof.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the cabin with a single rectangular window and part of the porch and railing visible on the left.
description_view_1: This view displays the gable end with a centered window and no visible door or porch.
description_view_2: This view mirrors view 0, showing the opposite side with the same window and partial porch visible on the right.
description_view_3: This view highlights the main entrance with a centered door, a small vertical window above it, and a full view of the porch and railing.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs and reddish-brown asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Two single rectangular windows, one on each long side, symmetrically placed and framed in white; no windows on the gable ends except for a small vertical window above the door
attribute_door_placement: One exterior door centered on the gable end with the porch, featuring a small vertical window above it
